scripts.dev:api: npm --workspace @bidscout/shared run build && npm --workspace @bidscout/api run dev
scripts.dev:mcp: npm --workspace @bidscout/shared run build && npm --workspace @bidscout/mcp run dev
scripts.dev:web: npm --workspace @bidscout/shared run build && npm --workspace @bidscout/web run dev
scripts.check:space-surfaces: npm --workspace @bidscout/shared run build && npm --workspace @bidscout/api run build && npm --workspace @bidscout/mcp run build && node scripts/verify-space-api-mcp-smoke.mjs
scripts.verify:space: npm run check:space && npm run check:space-search && npm run check:space-surfaces && npm test && npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.build: npm --workspace @bidscout/shared run build && npm --workspace @bidscout/api run build && npm --workspace @bidscout/mcp run build && npm --workspace @bidscout/web run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @bidscout/shared run typecheck && npm --workspace @bidscout/api run typecheck && npm --workspace @bidscout/mcp run typecheck && npm --workspace @bidscout/web run typecheck
